chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1447 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.5759/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2025 Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General a/w SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP Sukkur and ASI Jahangir Jagirani I.O of case bearing crime No.13/2024 of PS Qadirpur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The respondent No.3/ Investigation officer of crime No.13/2024 of PS Qadirpur files statement, which is taken on record. The investigation officers states that interim challan has already been submitted before the trial Court, and co-accused, namely Muhammad Moosa, has obtained bail from trial Court. However, petitioner No.2 is an absconder and petitioner No.1 is not in his contact. Record reflects that on last date of hearing, no one appeared on behalf of petitioner, therefore the instant petition is hereby dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
